metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_3099
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.5: "Nrx3-C1ql2/3 Signaling Recruits KARs in Cultured Hippocampal Neurons"
- "To define the roles for Nrx3-C1ql2/3 interactions in organizing KAR-containing synapses, we expressed Nrx3β+SS525b together with C1ql2 and C1ql3 (C1ql2+3) on the surface of HEK293 cells and cocultured them with C1ql2/3 null hippocampal neurons. We found that endogenous GluK2/3, as well as neuroligin 1 (NL1, a receptor that binds to all Nrx isoforms) and PSD95, accumulated in hippocampal neurons contacting HEK293 cells (Figure 5A). ". Experimental description: - Dissociated neurons were from mice.
lacking a corresponding gene to confirm antibody specificity. (Legend Fig. 1A, p. 754)
- Overexpressed C1QL2_MOUSE, Complement C1q-like protein 2, C1ql2, C1q/TNF-related protein 10 is of rat species: "A series of constructs for Mus musculus C1ql2 proteins (NP_997116) and C1ql3 proteins (NP_694795) with
an N-terminal or a C-terminal hemagglutinin (HA)-tag were amplified by PCR"
